nasb.text: She *said to Him, “Yes, Lord; I have believed that You are the Christ, the Son of God, even He who comes into the world.”

esv.text: She said to him, “Yes, Lord; I believe that you are the Christ, the Son of God, who is coming into the world.”

cnv.text: 她說：“主啊，我信；我已經信了，你是基督，是　神的兒子，是那要到世上來的。”

ccb.text: 玛大说：“主啊，我信！我相信你是来到世界的基督，是上帝的儿子。”

csbs.text: 玛妲说：“是的，主啊！我相信你是基督，是神的儿子，就是要到世界上来的那一位。”
